englishDefinitions: A person who keeps their promises and does exactly what they say they will do.
Someone who is reliable, trustworthy, and true to their commitments.
persianTranslation: کسی که به قولش عمل می‌کند
examples: He said he would repay the loan within a year, and he did — he's a man of his word.
I'm a man of my word; if I promise something, I always follow through.
Everyone in town trusted her because she was known as a woman of her word.
